metadata.description: The Intelligence Briefing suite — a daily/weekly triage routine that gives complete visibility across the outside world and your own work. Hosts the intelligence-briefing plugin and the producers/review step that build on its shared candidate-item contract.

plugins.name: intelligence-briefing
plugins.description: A daily/weekly intelligence routine: an external-world scan (the environmental brief) plus the shared spine for internal scans (meetings, comms) and a review step that triages candidates into your backlog. This release ships the external scan and the shared contract the rest of the suite plugs into.
